title: Wesley Church, Egmore
tagline: Wesley Church, Egmore — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Wesley Church is one of the oldest churches in Egmore area of Chennai, the capital of the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Wesley Church is one of the oldest churches in Egmore area of Chennai, the capital of the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The original structure was built in Gothic architecture in 1903 by Wesleyan Mission. It was constructed at Egmore considering the growing needs of it in the area around Egmore. The church is named after John Wesley, the founder of Methodist Movement in 140 countries.

topPlaces.name: Egmore taluk
topPlaces.description: Egmore taluk is a taluk of the city district of Chennai in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was formed in December 2013 from parts of the Egmore-Nungambakkam taluk.

topPlaces.name: Elumur Ardhanareeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Elumur Ardhanareeswarar Temple is a Siva temple in Egmore in Chennai in Tamil Nadu (India). It is one of the shrines of the Vaippu Sthalams sung by Tamil Saivite Nayanar Appar.

topPlaces.name: Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Egmore
topPlaces.description: Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Egmore which is maintained under the control of Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department, Government of Tamil Nadu, is a Perumal temple situated in Egmore neighbourhood in Chennai district of Tamil Nadu in India. It was previously called as Lakshmi Narayana Perumal Temple and hence the name Lakshmi Narayana Perumal street, where the temple is located.

topPlaces.name: Purasawalkam Gangadeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Purasawalkam Gangadeeswarar Temple is a Shiva Temple situated in Purasawalkam neighbourhood of Chennai district in Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. It is a five-tiered temple.

topPlaces.name: Purasawalkam Srinivasa Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Srinivasa Perumal Temple is a Perumal Temple situated in Purasawalkam neighbourhood of Chennai district in Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. It is located at an altitude of about 33 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 13.081875°N 80.250920°E / 13.081875; 80.250920 (i.e., 13°04'54.8"N, 80°15'03.3"E).

topPlaces.name: Vellala Street
topPlaces.description: Vellala Street, also known as Vellalar Street, is a residential street in Purasawalkam in Chennai in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Vellalar is supposedly a caste name crediting to the early residents who belonged to this caste.

topPlaces.name: St. Andrew's Church, Chennai
topPlaces.description: St. Andrew's Church (Tamil: புனித அந்திரேயா கோவில்) in Egmore, Chennai, India was built to serve the Scottish community in Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Mayor Radhakrishnan Hockey Stadium
topPlaces.description: Mayor Radhakrishnan Stadium is a field hockey stadium at Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. Named after M. Radhakrishna Pillai, it was the venue to the 1996 Men's Champions Trophy, and hosted the tournament again in December 2005.

It was previously called as Lakshmi Narayana Perumal Temple and hence the name Lakshmi Narayana Perumal street, where the temple is located.
Purasawalkam Gangadeeswarar Temple is a Shiva Temple situated in Purasawalkam neighbourhood of Chennai district in Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. It is a five-tiered temple.

It is located at an altitude of about 33 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 13.081875°N 80.250920°E / 13.081875; 80.250920 (i.e., 13°04'54.8"N, 80°15'03.3"E).

Vellala Street, also known as Vellalar Street, is a residential street in Purasawalkam in Chennai in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Vellalar is supposedly a caste name crediting to the early residents who belonged to this caste.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Wesley Church, Egmore?
faq.a: The best time to visit Wesley Church, Egmore is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Wesley Church, Egmore?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Wesley Church, Egmore?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Wesley Church, Egmore at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Wesley Church, Egmore?
faq.a: Stays in Wesley Church, Egmore start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Wesley Church, Egmore?
faq.a: The top attractions are Egmore taluk, Elumur Ardhanareeswarar Temple, Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Egmore, Purasawalkam Gangadeeswarar Temple, Purasawalkam Srinivasa Perumal Temple.
